notes: Active - prompts in sequence for FIRSTNAME, LASTNAME, and STATE, then opens up to 8 new tabs (TruePeopleSearch, FastPeopleSearch, FamilyTreeNow, SearchPeopleFree, Spokeo, Whitepages, ThatsThem, CyberBackgroundChecks). Generic utility, not tied to any specific page. In headless CI the prompts are auto-dismissed (return null), so the if-check fails and no tabs open. We only verify no JS errors occur.
